verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You answered the call and obeyed God's command He sent you here, we know you're in His hands Your message from the Word, touches our very soul We've seen your faithfulness and we want you to know

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Pastor, we love you, we appreciate all you do And God sees the sacrifice, you've made for Jesus Christ You pray for the lost and God leads them to the cross And we know one day, you'll hear your Father say, "My child, well done, my child, well done"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the still quiet place, on your knees in prayer God sees your tears, Hears the burdens you bear The Lord's by your side, He blesses all that you do Through the good and bad times, He'll see you through
